markets.question: New Rihanna Album before GTA VI?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Rihanna officially releases a new album before Grand Theft Auto VI is officially released in the US. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If neither occurs by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to 50-50.

For the purposes of this market, "release" refers to the game becoming publicly available for purchase or download in the US. Early access, beta versions, other forms of pre-release availability, or leaks will not count as an official release. If the release is only for certain consoles (e.g. Xbox Series X/S) it will count.

The resolution source for the release of GTA VI is official information from Rockstar Games or its parent company, Take-Two Interactive.

Officially released means that a newly released album is officially available for download or streaming (not including live events) by the resolution date.

Re-releases, deluxe editions, compilations, or greatest hits albums will not count, unless they contain at least 50% tracks that have never been officially released in any format prior to the album's release.

The resolution source for the album release will be any official streaming or download site, e.g. Apple Music or Spotify.

events.title: What will happen before GTA VI?
events.description: This is a market on predicting events that will occur before the release of Grand Theft Auto VI.

eventMetadata.context_description: The delayed November 19, 2026 release date for Grand Theft Auto VI has created a wide window for major cultural and global events to unfold first, shaping trader focus on the market's multi-outcome structure. Rockstar's recent pre-order teaser and hints of a third trailer expected imminently have intensified anticipation, while Take-Two's upcoming May earnings call could signal further marketing ramps or stability in the timeline. High-implied probabilities for outcomes like a Russia-Ukraine ceasefire reflect ongoing geopolitical momentum that could resolve well before launch, alongside music milestones such as Drake's Iceman album amid shifting streaming and chart dynamics. Historical patterns of Rockstar's methodical reveals suggest late-2026 trailers and promotions will remain key swing factors, with traders weighing how confirmed industry updates versus external developments could alter the leaderboard.

eventMetadata.context_description: Rockstar Games’ official delay of Grand Theft Auto VI to November 19, 2026, announced last fall after an earlier shift from 2025, has locked in the current release window and driven overwhelming trader consensus toward a “No” outcome. Multiple statements from the studio emphasize the need for additional polish on the sprawling Vice City setting and online features, consistent with Rockstar’s history of prioritizing quality over rushed launches. With just weeks left before June 2026 and no new trailer or surprise drop announced, any earlier release would require an unprecedented last-minute reversal. While an accidental early build leak or sudden policy change remains theoretically possible, such scenarios have never occurred in the franchise’s development cycle and would contradict all verified updates from Take-Two Interactive.

markets.question: Will Harvey Weinstein be sentenced to no prison time?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the prison sentence, if any, imposed on Harvey Weinstein as part of his ongoing New York retrial (People of the State of New York v. Harvey Weinstein) by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

This market will resolve immediately based on the first sentence rendered in this case, regardless of any appeals. If Weinstein is found not guilty, there is a mistrial, or if the first sentencing does not include any jail or prison time, this market will resolve to "No Prison Time."

If no sentencing takes place by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will also resolve to "No Prison Time."

If the sentence falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

For the purposes of this market, it does not matter whether the sentence is concurrent or consecutive to any existing sentence Weinstein is already serving. The market will resolve based on the total prison sentence imposed in this case.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the New York court system or other involved U.S. government sources; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent developments in Harvey Weinstein’s New York retrial have sharply shaped trader sentiment, with the latest jury deadlock and subsequent mistrial on the Jessica Mann rape charge reinforcing expectations of limited or no additional prison time. At 74 and with documented health complications including recent cardiac issues, the former producer’s ongoing appeals and prior mixed verdicts have fueled consensus that prosecutors face steep hurdles in securing further convictions or extended sentencing. Historical patterns from his overturned 2020 conviction and hung jury in 2025 underscore how procedural challenges and medical considerations can influence outcomes in high-profile cases. Upcoming rulings on remaining California matters and any health-based release motions represent the next key catalysts likely to sustain or shift these implied probabilities.

events.title: 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NHL Stanley Cup championship.

eventMetadata.context_description: The 2025-26 NHL regular season left the Colorado Avalanche and Carolina Hurricanes as the clear frontrunners for the 2026 Stanley Cup, with the Avalanche posting the league’s best record and goal differential while the Hurricanes secured the top seed in the East. Both clubs carry deep, experienced rosters into the playoffs, where strong special-teams play, goaltending stability, and favorable matchups have kept their implied probabilities tightly bunched near 40 percent. Vegas, Montreal, and Buffalo sit further back after solid but less dominant campaigns, giving them realistic paths forward if injuries or series swings create openings. Trader consensus reflects these established strengths alongside the inherent unpredictability of postseason hockey.

eventMetadata.context_description: The 2025-26 NHL regular season left the Colorado Avalanche and Carolina Hurricanes as the clear frontrunners for the 2026 Stanley Cup, with the Avalanche posting the league’s best record and goal differential while the Hurricanes secured the top seed in the East. Both clubs carry deep, experienced rosters into the playoffs, where strong special-teams play, goaltending stability, and favorable matchups have kept their implied probabilities tightly bunched near 40 percent. Vegas, Montreal, and Buffalo sit further back after solid but less dominant campaigns, giving them realistic paths forward if injuries or series swings create openings. Trader consensus reflects these established strengths alongside the inherent unpredictability of postseason hockey.

events.title: 2026 NBA Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NBA Finals.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Oklahoma City Thunder hold the strongest position in the 2026 NBA title market after posting the league's best regular-season record and advancing deep into the playoffs with efficient wins across early rounds. Victor Wembanyama's elevated scoring and defensive impact have elevated the San Antonio Spurs as the clearest Western Conference challenger, shortening their implied probability amid strong series results. The New York Knicks have capitalized on Eastern Conference opportunities with steady advancement and home-court advantages, while the Detroit Pistons and Cleveland Cavaliers encounter tougher elimination risks following inconsistent playoff outcomes. Current trader consensus centers on the Thunder's roster depth, recent form, and matchup history as the core factors sustaining their lead.

markets.question: Will MegaETH perform an airdrop by June 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if MegaETH launches a token and performs an airdrop by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

For the purposes of this market "locked" tokens or non-swappable tokens will not suffice to resolve this market to "Yes". Airdrops of NFTs will not qualify.

The primary resolution source for this market is on-chain information and official information from MegaETH, however a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

markets.question: Will Spain win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the national team that wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

If at any point it becomes impossible for this team to win the FIFA World Cup based on the rules of FIFA (e.g., they are eliminated in the knockout stage), this market will resolve immediately to “No”.

If the 2026 FIFA World Cup is permanently canceled or has not been completed by October 13, 2026, 11:59 PM this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from FIFA, however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: The tightly bunched probabilities among leading national teams stem from comparable squad depth, recent international form, and favorable group-stage draws in the expanded 48-team format. Spain’s tactical cohesion and extended unbeaten streak position them as a top contender, while France’s unmatched rotation options and recent match results sustain their slight edge. Argentina carry defending-champion experience despite occasional injury concerns, and England benefit from strong club-level performances by key players. Brazil’s attacking talent and Germany’s organizational improvements add further layers, with Portugal and others close behind. This balance keeps the field wide open through the knockout stages, where any of the top sides could advance deep based on fitness and momentum.

markets.question: Xi Jinping out before 2027?
markets.description:

This market will resolve to “Yes” if the named individual wins and accepts the 2028 nomination of the Democratic Party for U.S. president. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Democratic Party sources.

Any replacement of the democratic nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Gavin Newsom holds the strongest position in trader consensus for the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination, driven by his consistent leads in early California and national polling along with a May 11 endorsement from major donor Steven Spielberg that highlights growing fundraising strength. The wide-open field features Kamala Harris drawing on name recognition from her prior vice presidential and 2024 campaign roles, while Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez benefits from progressive voter enthusiasm in a fragmented primary environment. Other contenders such as Jon Ossoff, Josh Shapiro, and Pete Buttigieg differentiate through Senate experience, gubernatorial records, or national visibility. Key factors that could consolidate support include 2026 midterm results, shifts in primary polling trends, and party reactions to Republican governance, with recent Democratic governor fundraisers underscoring early positioning among potential candidates.
